title: E Commerce Main Image New Chinese Aesthetics Style
sourceTitle: E Commerce Main Image New Chinese Aesthetics Style Chart

imagePrompts.prompt: {"type":"Chinese aesthetic infographic poster","topic":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"新中式美学风格图谱\"}","style":"elegant new Chinese style, refined editorial infographic, luxury cultural branding board","canvas":{"orientation":"portrait","background":"warm ivory paper texture with very subtle grain","palette":["ivory","ink black","dark forest green","muted jade","gold","terracotta red","soft beige"]},"header":{"title":"新中式美学风格图谱","subtitle":"商业传播类·东方美学的现代表达","decorations":{"left":"ink-style bamboo branch with a thin vertical label reading 现代演绎 and small hanging ornament","right":"large muted red sun disc, 2 flying cranes, thin cloud-line motifs, small red seal stamp"}},"layout":{"structure":"6 rounded-rectangle cards arranged in 2 rows by 3 columns","card_count":6,"sections":[{"title":"01 国潮品牌风","position":"top-left","count":1,"labels":["GUOCHAO BRAND STYLE"],"keywords":["国潮","青年","潮流","文化"],"image":"arched product mockup with 3 items: one shopping bag with crane-and-mountain illustration, one rectangular product box with matching pattern, one takeaway cup; soft studio lighting","caption":"融合传统文化与潮流设计，传递年轻化的东方品牌态度。"},{"title":"02 东方奢侈风","position":"top-center","count":1,"labels":["ORIENTAL LUXURY STYLE"],"keywords":["高端","奢华","质感","东方"],"image":"arched luxury perfume ad with 1 dark glass bottle centered against a black and deep green background, gold mountain line art, reflective surface, vertical Chinese text 东隐奢香","caption":"以东方美学为底蕴，呈现高端、精致、含蓄的品牌气质。"},{"title":"03 新中式电商风","position":"top-right","count":1,"labels":["NEW CHINESE E-COMMERCE STYLE"],"keywords":["电商","产品","视觉","促销"],"image":"arched e-commerce product card with 1 white teapot on a wooden stand, bamboo and moon-gate backdrop, promotional layout showing price ¥298 and small shopping cart icon","caption":"将东方美学融入产品视觉，打造具有转化力的电商美学体验。"},{"title":"04 东方幻想风","position":"bottom-left","count":1,"labels":["ORIENTAL FANTASY STYLE"],"keywords":["幻想","神话","创意","想象"],"image":"arched fantasy illustration with 1 large full moon, 1 traditional palace, swirling clouds and water, 2 white cranes, blossoms, dramatic teal-and-gold atmosphere","caption":"以东方神话与想象为灵感，创造富有故事感的视觉体验。"},{"title":"05 节气文化风","position":"bottom-center","count":4,"labels":["春分","夏至","秋分","冬至"],"keywords":["节气","时令","文化","情感"],"image":"4 narrow vertical seasonal panels showing plum blossoms for spring, lotus for summer, maple leaves for autumn, snowy branches and mountains for winter","caption":"结合二十四节气与传统文化，传递时间之美与东方生活智慧。"},{"title":"06 非遗视觉风","position":"bottom-right","count":1,"labels":["INTANGIBLE HERITAGE STYLE"],"keywords":["非遗","传统","工艺","传承"],"image":"arched heritage-themed display with 2 craft objects: one ornate floral porcelain vase and one folding fan, dark circular backdrop with gold decorative lines and bold Chinese text 匠心传承","caption":"以非遗工艺与传统艺术为核心，展现东方文化的传承与匠心。"}],"footer":{"text":"东方美学·现代演绎","seal":"small red square seal centered at bottom"}},"typography":{"title_font":"large Songti-style Chinese serif","body_font":"clean serif with small English subtitles","numbers":"prominent two-digit section numbers 01 to 06 in dark green"},"rendering":"clean print-ready poster, balanced spacing, premium editorial design, high legibility, soft shadows, polished composition"}

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

{"type":"Chinese aesthetic infographic poster","topic":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"新中式美学风格图谱\"}","style":"elegant new Chinese style, refined editorial infographic, luxury cultural columns","card_count":6,"sections":[{"title":"01 国潮品牌风","position":"top-left","count":1,"labels":["GUOCHAO BRAND STYLE"],"keywords":["国潮","青年","潮流","文化"],"image":"arched product mockup with 3 items: promptTranslations.zh: {"type":"中式美学信息图海报","topic":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"新中式美学风格图谱\"}","style":"优雅的新中式风格，精致编辑类信息图，奢华文化品牌板","canvas":{"orientation":"portrait","background":"温暖象牙色纸张纹理，带极细颗粒感","palette":["象牙白","墨黑","深森绿","柔和翡翠绿","金色","赭石红","柔和米色"]},"header":{"title":"新中式美学风格图谱","subtitle":"商业传播类·东方美学的现代表达","decorations":{"left":"墨竹枝条水墨风，配细竖标签‘现代演绎’及小挂饰","right":"大赭石红太阳盘，2只飞鹤，细云纹，红色小印章"}},"layout":{"structure":"6个圆角矩形卡片，2行3列排列","card_count":6,"sections":[{"title":"01 国潮品牌风","position":"左上","count":1,"labels":["国潮品牌风格"],"keywords":["国潮","青年","潮流","文化"],"image":"拱形产品模型，3件：印有鹤与山形图案购物袋、印花长方盒、外带杯；柔和工作室灯光","caption":"融合传统文化与潮流设计，传递年轻化的东方品牌态度。"},{"title":"02 东方奢侈风","position":"上中","count":1,"labels":["东方奢侈风"],"keywords":["高端","奢华","质感","东方"],"image":"拱形奢侈香水广告，1瓶暗红色玻璃瓶居中，黑绿背景，金色山线艺术，反光表面，竖排中文文本‘东隐奢香’","caption":"以东方美学为底蕴，呈现高端、精致、含蓄的品牌气质。"},{"title":"03 新中式电商风","position":"右上","count":1,"labels":["新中式电商风"],"keywords":["电商","产品","视觉","促销"],"image":"拱形电商产品卡，1白色茶壶置于木台，背景竹子与月门，促销布局显示¥298及购物车小图标","caption":"将东方美学融入产品视觉，打造具有转化力的电商美学体验。"},{"title":"04 东方幻想风","position":"左下","count":1,"labels":["东方幻想风"],"keywords":["幻想","神话","创意","想象"],"image":"拱形幻想插画，1大满月，1传统宫殿，云水缭绕，2白鹤，花朵繁盛，汤绿色与金色氛围浓烈","caption":"以东方神话与想象为灵感，创造富有故事感的视觉体验。"},{"title":"05 节气文化风","position":"下中","count":4,"labels":["春分","夏至","秋分","冬至"],"keywords":["节气","时令","文化","情感"],"image":"4条窄长垂直季节面板：春梅、夏莲、秋枫、冬雪山枝","caption":"结合二十四节气与传统文化，传递时间之美与东方生活智慧。"},{"title":"06 非遗视觉风","position":"右下","count":1,"labels":["非遗视觉风"],"keywords":["非遗","传统","工艺","传承"],"image":"拱形非遗主题展示，2工艺品：1精美花卉瓷瓶，1折扇，暗色圆形背景加金色装饰线与粗体中文‘匠心传承’","caption":"以非遗工艺与传统艺术为核心，展现东方文化的传承与匠心。"}],"footer":{"text":"东方美学·现代演绎","seal":"底部中央小红方印"}},"typography":{"title_font":"大型宋体中文衬线","body_font":"干净衬线配小英文字幕","numbers":"醒目的两位数字章节号01至06，深绿色"},"rendering":"干净印刷准备海报，均衡间距，高端编辑设计，高可读性，柔和阴影，精致布局"}
promptTranslations.fr: {"type":"Affiche infographique d'esthétique chinoise","topic":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"新中式美学风格图谱\"}","style":"style chinois moderne élégant, infographie éditoriale raffinée, tableau de branding culturel de luxe","canvas":{"orientation":"portrait","background":"texture de papier ivoire chaud avec un grain très subtil","palette":["ivoire","noir encre","vert forêt profond","jade sourd","or","rouge terre cuite","beige doux"]},"header":{"title":"新中式美学风格图谱","subtitle":"商业传播类·东方美学的现代表达","decorations":{"left":"branche de bambou style encre avec une fine étiquette verticale indiquant 现代演绎 et un petit ornement suspendu","right":"grand disque solaire rouge sourd, 2 grues en vol, motifs de lignes de nuages fins, petit sceau rouge"}},"layout":{"structure":"6 cartes rectangulaires aux coins arrondis disposées en 2 rangées de 3 colonnes","card_count":6,"sections":[{"title":"01 国潮品牌风","position":"en haut à gauche","count":1,"labels":["STYLE DE MARQUE GUOCHAO"],"keywords":["国潮","jeunesse","tendance","culture"],"image":"maquette de produit arquée avec 3 articles : un sac shopping avec illustration de grue et montagne, une boîte de produit rectangulaire avec motif assorti, un gobelet à emporter ; éclairage de studio doux","caption":"Fusion de la culture traditionnelle et du design tendance, transmettant une attitude de marque orientale rajeunie."},{"title":"02 东方奢侈风","position":"en haut au centre","count":1,"labels":["STYLE DE LUXE ORIENTAL"],"keywords":["haut de gamme","luxe","texture","oriental"],"image":"publicité de parfum de luxe arquée avec 1 flacon en verre sombre centré sur un fond noir et vert profond, art linéaire de montagne dorée, surface réfléchissante, texte chinois vertical 东隐奢香","caption":"Basé sur l'esthétique orientale, présentant un tempérament de marque haut de gamme, raffiné et subtil."},{"title":"03 新中式电商风","position":"en haut à droite","count":1,"labels":["STYLE E-COMMERCE NOUVEAU CHINOIS"],"keywords":["e-commerce","produit","visuel","promotion"],"image":"carte produit e-commerce arquée avec 1 théière blanche sur un support en bois, toile de fond bambou et porte de lune, mise en page promotionnelle affichant le prix ¥298 et une petite icône de panier","caption":"Intégration de l'esthétique orientale dans le visuel produit pour créer une expérience e-commerce esthétique et efficace."},{"title":"04 东方幻想风","position":"en bas à gauche","count":1,"labels":["STYLE FANTAISIE ORIENTALE"],"keywords":["fantaisie","mythe","créativité","imagination"],"image":"illustration fantastique arquée avec 1 grande pleine lune, 1 palais traditionnel, nuages et eau tourbillonnants, 2 grues blanches, fleurs, atmosphère dramatique sarcelle et or","caption":"Inspiré par les mythes et l'imagination orientaux, créant une expérience visuelle riche en narration."},{"title":"05 节气文化风","position":"en bas au centre","count":4,"labels":["Équinoxe de printemps","Solstice d'été","Équinoxe d'automne","Solstice d'hiver"],"keywords":["termes solaires","saisons","culture","émotion"],"image":"4 panneaux verticaux étroits saisonniers montrant des fleurs de prunier pour le printemps, lotus pour l'été, feuilles d'érable pour l'automne, branches enneigées et montagnes pour l'hiver","caption":"Combinant les 24 termes solaires et la culture traditionnelle, transmettant la beauté du temps et la sagesse de vie orientale."},{"title":"06 非遗视觉风","position":"en bas à droite","count":1,"labels":["STYLE PATRIMOINE IMMATÉRIEL"],"keywords":["patrimoine","tradition","artisanat","transmission"],"image":"présentation arquée sur le thème du patrimoine avec 2 objets artisanaux : un vase en porcelaine florale orné et un éventail pliant, toile de fond circulaire sombre avec lignes décoratives dorées et texte chinois audacieux 匠心传承","caption":"Centré sur l'artisanat du patrimoine immatériel et l'art traditionnel, mettant en valeur la transmission et l'ingéniosité de la culture orientale."}],"footer":{"text":"东方美学·现代演绎","seal":"petit sceau carré rouge centré en bas"}},"typography":{"title_font":"grande police serif chinoise style Songti","body_font":"serif épuré avec petits sous-titres anglais","numbers":"numéros de section à deux chiffres proéminents de 01 à 06 en vert foncé"},"rendering":"affiche propre prête à imprimer, espacement équilibré, design éditorial premium, haute lisibilité, ombres douces, composition soignée"}

부드러운 스튜디오 조명","caption":"전통 문화와 트렌디한 디자인을 결합하여 젊은 감각의 동양적 브랜드 태도를 전달합니다."},{"title":"02 东方奢侈风","position":"top-center","count":1,"labels":["ORIENTAL LUXURY STYLE"],"keywords":["하이엔드","럭셔리","질감","동양"],"image":"블랙과 딥 그린 배경, 금색 산 라인 아트, 반사되는 표면, 세로형 중국어 텍스트 '东隐奢香'이 적힌 아치형 럭셔리 향수 광고","caption":"동양 미학을 바탕으로 하이엔드, 정교함, 절제된 브랜드 기품을 표현합니다."},{"title":"03 新中式电商风","position":"top-right","count":1,"labels":["NEW CHINESE E-COMMERCE STYLE"],"keywords":["이커머스","제품","비주얼","프로모션"],"image":"나무 받침대 위의 흰색 다기 세트, 대나무와 달 모양 창문 배경, 가격 ¥298과 작은 쇼핑카트 아이콘이 포함된 아치형 이커머스 제품 카드","caption":"동양 미학을 제품 비주얼에 녹여 구매 전환을 유도하는 이커머스 미학 경험을 창조합니다."},{"title":"04 东方幻想风","position":"bottom-left","count":1,"labels":["ORIENTAL FANTASY STYLE"],"keywords":["판타지","신화","창의","상상"],"image":"커다란 보름달, 전통 궁궐, 소용돌이치는 구름과 물, 2마리의 흰 학, 꽃, 드라마틱한 틸과 골드 분위기의 아치형 판타지 일러스트","caption":"동양 신화와 상상력에서 영감을 받아 이야기 중심의 시각적 경험을 창조합니다."},{"title":"05 节气文化风","position":"bottom-center","count":4,"labels":["춘분","하지","추분","동지"],"keywords":["절기","계절","문화","감성"],"image":"봄의 매화, 여름의 연꽃, 가을의 단풍, 겨울의 눈 덮인 가지와 산을 보여주는 4개의 좁은 세로형 계절 패널","caption":"24절기와 전통 문화를 결합하여 시간의 아름다움과 동양의 생활 지혜를 전달합니다."},{"title":"06 非遗视觉风","position":"bottom-right","count":1,"labels":["INTANGIBLE HERITAGE STYLE"],"keywords":["무형문화유산","전통","공예","계승"],"image":"화려한 꽃무늬 도자기 꽃병과 접이식 부채, 금색 장식 라인과 굵은 중국어 텍스트 '匠心传承'이 적힌 어두운 원형 배경의 아치형 공예품 디스플레이","caption":"무형문화유산 공예와 전통 예술을 핵심으로 동양 문화의 계승과 장인 정신을 보여줍니다."}],"footer":{"text":"东方美学·现代演绎","seal":"하단 중앙의 작은 붉은색 정사각형 낙관"}},"typography":{"title_font":"대형 송체 스타일의 중국어 세리프","body_font":"작은 영어 자막이 포함된 깔끔한 세리프","numbers":"다크 그린 색상의 눈에 띄는 01부터 06까지의 두 자리 섹션 번호"},"rendering":"깔끔한 인쇄용 포스터, 균형 잡힌 간격, 프리미엄 에디토리얼 디자인, 높은 가독성, 부드러운 그림자, 세련된 구도"}
